summary: BLOCK 141 - Honey-Orange Spectrum Reflux & Hive Layout Restructuring. All 7 features tested and verified working correctly. Layout order, gradients, mobile UI, and Buzz In button all pass.

hive_layout_order.details: Title Y=96 → Toggle Y=156 → Composer Y=208 → Filters Y=334 → Daily Prompt Y=376
hive_layout_order.order_verified: Title 'The Hive' → All/Following Toggle → Composer Bar → Filter Chips → Daily Prompt + Feed

desktop_composer_bar.all_5_buttons_visible: PASS - Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Note, Randomizer all visible with labels
desktop_composer_bar.white_text_icons: PASS - All 5 buttons have rgb(255, 255, 255) text color

mobile_composer_bar_390px.all_buttons_icon_only: PASS - All 5 buttons have labels hidden (md:inline class hides labels below 768px)

buzz_in_button.matches_now_spinning: PASS - Same gradient as Now Spinning (#FF9800 to #F57C00 at 135deg)

all_following_toggle.functionality: Both All and Following buttons are clickable and toggle feed modes correctly

modal_functionality.note_modal: PASS - Opens correctly (title uses sr-only class)

critical_code_review_comments: ComposerBar.js line 317-323: spectrum array correctly defines progressive 135deg gradients from #FF9800 through #BF360C
HivePage.js layout order verified: Title (689-695) → Toggle (697-725) → Composer (728) → Filters (731-751) → DailyPrompt (771)
DailyPrompt.js line 85: Buzz In button inline style correctly matches Now Spinning gradient
Mobile CSS 'h-9 w-9 aspect-square md:w-auto md:aspect-auto' correctly enforces icon-only circles on mobile
Label visibility 'hidden md:inline' properly hides labels below 768px breakpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 141 fully tested. Hive layout order: Title→Toggle→Composer→Filters→Feed. ComposerBar progressive 135deg gradients: Now Spinning=#FF9800→#F57C00, Haul=#F57C00→#EF6C00, ISO=#EF6C00→#E65100, Note=#E65100→#D84315, Randomizer=#D84315→#BF360C. All buttons have white text. Mobile (<768px) shows all 5 buttons as 36x36px icon-only circles. Buzz In button matches Now Spinning gradient. All modals and filters working correctly.
